name: save_screening_report
description: Saves the complete dementia screening report to the Medavie database. This tool should be called at the end of the interview process, or immediately before transferring the call to a human agent if escalation criteria are met.

date_of_birth.description: The patient's date of birth in ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD)

sex_assigned_at_birth.description: The sex assigned to the patient at birth

level_of_education.description: The patient's highest level of education completed

orientation_year_response.description: The caller's response when asked for the current year

orientation_month_response.description: The caller's response when asked for the current month

orientation_date_response.description: The caller's response when asked for today's date

orientation_place_response.description: The caller's response when asked to identify their current location or building

health_conditions.description: Object containing the patient's reported chronic health conditions

digit_span_forward_provided.description: The sequence of digits read to the caller for the forward span test

digit_span_forward_response.description: The caller's attempt to repeat the forward digits in the same order

digit_span_reverse_provided.description: The sequence of digits read to the caller for the reverse span test

digit_span_reverse_response.description: The caller's attempt to repeat the reverse digits in backwards order

transfer_reason.description: The specific reason for escalating to a human, if applicable (e.g., 'Significant disorientation')

is_transferred.description: Boolean flag indicating if the caller met escalation criteria and was transferred to a human agent
